primary.title: Apex Financial — Risk & Revenue Intelligence
primary.description: Natural language exploration of 100K Apex Financial transactions. Ask about revenue by category, high-risk accounts, daily trends, customer segments, and fraud risk metrics. Powered by Unity Catalog gold and silver tables in workspace.finserv.

backup.title: Apex Financial — Risk & Revenue Intelligence
backup.description: Natural language exploration of 100K Apex Financial transactions. Ask about revenue by category, high-risk accounts, daily trends, customer segments, and fraud risk metrics. Powered by Unity Catalog gold and silver tables in workspace.finserv.
sample_questions: What are the top 5 transaction categories by total revenue?
Which customer segments have the highest average risk score?
What is the daily transaction volume and revenue trend?
How many transactions were flagged as high risk, and what percentage is that?
What is the total revenue across all transaction categories?
Which categories have the highest ratio of declined transactions?
Show me revenue and risk metrics broken down by customer segment
Which day had the most high-risk transactions?

gotchas: Tables MUST be sorted alphabetically by identifier — API rejects unsorted
Pass table_identifiers as top-level API field alongside serialized_space (not inside it)
SampleQuestion.id must be lowercase 32-hex UUID without hyphens — uuid.uuid4().hex
SampleQuestion.question is an ARRAY of strings, not a plain string
Genie Space permissions: data-rooms is NOT a valid ACL object type — workspace admins have access automatically
databricks auth token -p slysik-aws-backup-sp is BROKEN on macOS — get token via curl client_credentials
